uk: + Преподобного отця нашого й ісповідника Харитона
Святої мучениці Людмили і св. В'ячеслава, князя чеського
Собор преподобних отців Печерських, що спочивають у ближніх печерах преподобного Антонія
saints.en: Ven. Confessor Chariton. St. Martyr Ludmila & St. Wenceslaus, Prince of Bohemia. Synaxis of the Ven. Fathers of the Kyiv Caves Who Repose in the Near Caves of Ven. Anthony. Blessed Hieromartyr Mykyta

rubrics:
Вечірня: «Блажен муж». На «Господи, взиваю» – 8 стихир: прп., Слава: прп., І нині: богородичний-догмат за голосом прп. Вхід. Прокімен дня. Три читання: Муд. 5:15-6:3, Муд. 3:1-9, Муд. 4:7-15. На стиховні: прп., Слава: прп., І нині: богород. з недільної стиховні за гласом прп. Тропар прп. І нині: богород. воскресний за гласом прп. Відпуст великий з помин. прп.
Утреня: по «Бог Господь»: тропар прп. (2), Слава, І нині: богород. з недільних за гл. тропаря прп. Катизми чергові зі сідальними прп., також полієлей з величаннями прп., мала єктенія з виголосом «Бо благословиться» й післяполієлейний сідальний прп. Степенна 4 гл. Прокімен: прп. Єв. – Мт. 10 зач.; 4, 25 – 5, 12. Канон Богородиці і прп. Катавасія: «Відкрию уста мої». По 3-ій пісні – сідальний прп. По 6-ій – кондак-ікос прп. По 9-ій – світильний прп. Хвалитних стихир – 4: прп. Слава: прп., І нині: богород. з недільних за голосом наславника. По великому славослов'ї – тропар прп. Слава і нині: богород. з недільних за голосом тропаря прп. Відпуст великий з помин. служби прп.
Часи: на всіх – тропар і кондак.
Літургія: вся служба – прп. Ряд.: Ап. – Флп. 235 зач.; 1, 1-7. Єв. – Лк. 16 зач.; 4, 37-44. Ісп.: Ап. – 2 Кор. 176 зач.; 4, 6-15. Єв. – Лк. 24 зач.; 6, 17-23.

troparion_en.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / Our Father Chariton, pray to Christ God to save our souls!

kontakion_en.text: You delighted in the monastic life, divinely-wise one / and conquered the bodily passions; / you increased in faith, blossoming as the tree of life in the midst of Paradise, / most blessed and holy Chariton!

matched_oca_saint: Venerable Chariton the Confessor, Abbot of Palestine

oca_saints.name: Venerable Chariton the Confessor, Abbot of Palestine

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / Our Father Chariton, pray to Christ God to save our souls!

kontakion.text: You delighted in the monastic life, divinely-wise one / and conquered the bodily passions; / you increased in faith, blossoming as the tree of life in the midst of Paradise, / most blessed and holy Chariton!

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Chariton, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Herodion, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

You were worthy of the light of prophecy / becoming a companion to Jeremiah. / You foretold the self-emptying of God the Word / which he wrought for the salvation of the world. / Now all heirs of his kingdom honor you, O holy Prophet Baruch!

kontakion.text: (Podoben: “Today You have shown forth...”)Enlightened by the Spirit, your pure heart became the dwelling place of most splendid prophecy; / for you saw things far off as if they were near.  / Therefore, we honor you, blessed and glorious Prophet Baruch.

oca_saints.name: Martyr Alexander and 30 others in Pisidia and Phrygia

troparion.text: Your holy martyr Alexander and his companions, O Lord, / through their sufferings have received incorruptible crowns from You, our God. / For having Your strength, they laid low their adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through their intercessions, save our souls!

oca_saints.name: Martyr Wenceslaus, Prince of the Czechs

troparion.text: Your holy martyr Wenceslaus, O Lord, / through his sufferings has received an incorruptible crown from You, our God. / For having Your strength, he laid low his adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through his intercessions, save our souls!

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “You sought the heights...”)
You appeared as a bright star announcing Christ with your radiance,  / which is repulsive to this world, O Martyr Wenceslaus;  / extinguishing the allure of false gods,  / you enlighten the faithful, /  always interceding for us all.

oca_saints.name: Schema-monk Cyril and Schema-nun Maria, the parents of Saint Sergius of Radonezh

troparion.text: In you the image was preserved with exactness, O Father Cyril and Mother Maria,  / for taking up your crosses, you followed after Christ.  / By so doing, you taught us to disregard the flesh, for it passes away,  / but to care instead for the soul, since it is immortal.  / Therefore, most venerable Father Cyril and Mother Maria your spirits rejoice with the Angels.

kontakion.text: O ye faithful, having gathered together today, /  let us glorify the blessed couple, the faithful Cyril and the kind Maria, /  for together with their beloved son, the Venerable Sergius,  / they pray to the One God in Trinity,  / to establish our land in Orthodoxy, to save families in the world,  / to protect the young from misfortunes and temptations, to strengthen the aged,  / and that our souls may be saved.
